tasks.notes: FGAP-026 phase 1.2 — 6-step sequenced plan COMPLETE at HEAD post-step-6. Steps: 1 DEC-0021 d64a0f3 (per-package atomic cascade canon); 2 C.3 COMPLETION 856e139 + f4dd1a2 (Gate A test rewrites + Gate B compileAgentSpec BNF catch + Gate C loop/resume fixture cascade + realpath fix); 3 C.2 retroactive audit /tmp/c2-retroactive-audit.md + Gate-2 closure ba58d78 (compile.ts:223/228 BNF catches); 4 C.4 audit /tmp/c4-pre-dispatch-audit.md + Gate-3 closure 3274466 (4 fixture sites); 5 canonical sub-phase analysis update 9608989 (Phase 7 retired; C.* per-package atomic); 6 status cascade final refresh. All 4 packages green: pi-context 390/0/0; pi-jit-agents 150/0/1; pi-workflows 824/0/2; pi-behavior-monitors 157/157. Substrate canon: DEC-0014/0015/0017/0018/0019/0020/0021 enacted; FGAP-033/034 filed; scripts/orchestrator/ POC bundle landed (10 scripts per DEC-0019/0020). Ahead for Phase 1.2 closure: F (project-dir.test.ts NEW 7 tests) + Section E husky-gate re-roll (extend pre-commit to npm run check && npm test now that all 4 packages green); then Phase 1.3 (read-config + read-schema tools) + Phases 2-10 of FGAP-026 closure plan.
